title: Bare Metals x Create Aeronautics
description: Bare Bones textures for Create Aeronautics ! ☁️
body:
![CABB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88a35a9baf8a1ca4a1fe87b30e7467e7f34e5cfe.png)
------------

This resource pack simplify the textures of [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) to fit with [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack !

You have to place this pack above [Bare Metals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-metals) in the list

- This resource pack is contained in [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) ! It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs
